title: Verify existing notification system implementation
description: Verify that all components of the notification system already exist and are correctly implemented: model (src/models/notification.ts), service (src/services/notifications.ts), routes (src/routes/notifications.ts), helpers (src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts), plus tests. Run tests to confirm correctness. This task exists solely to verify that @kody decompose correctly splits complex multi-area tasks into parallel sub-tasks.
existing_patterns: src/models/notification.ts — TypeScript interface/type exports for domain model
src/services/notifications.ts — Payload SDK service class with constructor injection
src/routes/notifications.ts — Next.js route handlers with withAuth HOC
src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts — Pure function utilities with JSDoc examples
src/services/notifications.test.ts — vitest with mockPayload, describe/it blocks
src/utils/notificationHelpers.test.ts — vitest with factory mock function pattern
